title: Tender Chicken Skillet
description: Quick and easy skillet dish made with tender chicken and a hint of American flavor.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of butter in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chicken to the skillet and cook until browned, about 5-6 minutes.
Remove the chicken from the skillet and set aside.
Add the remaining 1 tablespoon of butter to the skillet.
Add the sliced onion and minced garlic to the skillet and cook until softened, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the sliced bell peppers to the skillet and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes.
Return the chicken to the skillet and add the paprika, garlic powder, salt, and pepper. Stir to combine.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, until the chicken is cooked through.
